evaluation.notes: Four product lines: CFD (Prime 1-Phase and 2-Phase), Futures (Prime), and Stocks. Classic challenges are legacy and should not be presented as a current main option. CFD 1-Phase uses 4% daily drawdown and 7% max drawdown. CFD 2-Phase uses 5% daily drawdown and 10% max drawdown. Futures uses fixed dollar daily pause and max drawdown that trails on highest end-of-day balance until it reaches starting balance, then stays fixed. Futures Prime daily pause is OFF for accounts created after March 6. Stocks uses 2% daily pause and 5% max drawdown. 40% consistency rule applies during challenge phase. Stocks challenge has unlimited duration with 14-day inactivity limit. Futures Prime has a 30-day challenge duration. Traders can scale up to €5M. All accounts are demo accounts with virtual funds — all trading activity takes place in a simulated environment.

payouts.schedule: Varies by product: Prime CFD every 14 days, Futures Prime every 14 days for first two payouts then every 7 days after second payout if profit over $200, Stocks first payout after 3 profitable days with $100+ each

rules.consistencyRule: 40% rule applies during the challenge phase — no single trading day can account for more than 40% of the total profit target. Stocks specifically state this is challenge phase only.
rules.notes: News trading restricted within a 2-minute window before and after high-impact news events. Trade coordination and copy trading with other traders or accounts are prohibited. Certain EA behaviour is banned, and using third-party EAs can stop an account from passing or progressing. CFDs and Stocks can hold on weekdays, but Stocks are forcibly liquidated 10 minutes before market close. Inactivity limit: 21 days for CFD/Futures, 14 days for Stocks. All accounts are demo accounts with virtual funds — all trading activity takes place in a simulated environment.

markets.instruments: Forex (46 pairs), Commodities, Indices, Stocks, Crypto

trust.communitySize: 10,000+ active monthly accounts, $14M+ in rewards, 450K+ monthly trades, 180+ supported countries
notableFlags: Partners with Tickmill for cTrader liquidity
